feat.name: Voice of the Elements
feat.text: You inherit a primal dragon’s bond to base elements. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression on creatures with the elemental trait. You can also ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with elementals that don’t speak any language.

traits.name: Dragonblood
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dragonblood versatile heritage. These creatures are born of draconic lineage and often have draconic appearances.
